'''tazhusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:crackhemp|crackhemp]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-zh-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:crackhemp|crackhemp]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tazhusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæzhisith|tæzhisith]] || [[word:tæzhisij|tæzhisij]] || [[word:tæzhisish|tæzhisish]] || [[word:tæzhisi|tæzhisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tazhuzhusuth|tazhuzhusuth]] || [[word:tazhuzhusuj|tazhuzhusuj]] || [[word:tazhuzhusush|tazhuzhusush]] || [[word:tazhuzhusu|tazhuzhusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tazhusuth|tazhusuth]] || [[word:tazhusuj|tazhusuj]] || [[word:tazhusush|tazhusush]] || [[word:tazhusu|tazhusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tazhufsuth|tazhufsuth]] || [[word:tazhufsuj|tazhufsuj]] || [[word:tazhufsush|tazhufsush]] || [[word:tazhufsuf|tazhufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tazhusuthu|tazhusuthu]] || [[word:tazhusuju|tazhusuju]] || [[word:tazhusushu|tazhusushu]] || [[word:tazhusuku|tazhusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tazhusuth|tazhusuth]] || [[word:tazhusuj|tazhusuj]] || [[word:tazhusush|tazhusush]] || [[word:tazhusu|tazhusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tazhusuthul|tazhusuthul]] || [[word:tazhusujul|tazhusujul]] || [[word:tazhusushul|tazhusushul]] || [[word:tazhusukul|tazhusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tazhusuthuthu|tazhusuthuthu]] || [[word:tazhusujuju|tazhusujuju]] || [[word:tazhusushushu|tazhusushushu]] || [[word:tazhusuku|tazhusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tazhusuthun|tazhusuthun]] || [[word:tazhusujun|tazhusujun]] || [[word:tazhusushun|tazhusushun]] || [[word:tazhusukun|tazhusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tazhusuthuoro|tazhusuthuoro]] || [[word:tazhusujuoro|tazhusujuoro]] || [[word:tazhusushuoro|tazhusushuoro]] || [[word:tazhusukuoro|tazhusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
